titleStmt.title: SII 22.46: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 46. (A.R. No. 46 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. MĀR. KULAŚĒKHARA—34th YEAR (A.D. 1301)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Kanyā śu. 7, Sunday, Mūlā and yield the equivalent A.D. 1301. September 10.

The object of the record is to register a joint resolution of the three assemblies Kīḻkūṟṟu-Brahmadēśaṅgaḷilār, Agara-Brahmadēśāṅgaḷilār and Veḷḷāḷa-Ūrgaḷilār of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḷa-vaḷanāḍu to set apart 10 out of the 35 vēli of land belonging to them by purchase in the tirunāmattukkāṇi village Ponpaṟṟi, for burning 40 perpetual lamps in the temple of Kālakāladēvar for the welfare of the king (Ulaguḍaiya-Perumāḷ). The occasion for this gift is stated to be that their prayer to the god was answered by way of the king having resumed for himself the administration of their nāḍu from his younger brother, and thus having enabled them to return to their own homes from other regions to which they had fled owing to the disturbed state of the country for a long time, and where they had had to suffer great privations and miseries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śrīmeṟkirttikkumel komāṟapaṉpar tirupuvaṉaccakkara vattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu muppattuṉālāvatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu kiḻkūṟṟu brahmatecaṅkaḷilārum Akara brahmateyaṅkaḷilārum veḷḷāḷa Ūrkaḷilārum vyavasthai nammuṭaiya nāṭu neṭunāḷppaṭa kalakamāy nāṭṭai viṭṭu [ deśāntiraṅkaḷi] ley(y)
poy kilecappaṭukaiyālum nammuṭaiya nāṭṭai Ulakuṭaiya perumāḷ tiruttampimārkku tirukkaivaḻakkamāka prasādañceytaruḷukaiyālum muṉṉampol Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭai Ulakuṭaiya perumāḷ kaikkoṇṭu Aruḷi Eṅkaḷaiyum Eṅkaḷ janmadeśaṅkaḷile pukutaviṭṭu Aruḷi Ulakuṭaiya perumāḷ tirumeṉikku naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār kālakālatevarkku nūṟṟeṭṭu tirununtāviḷakku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Iṭuvatāka nāṭāka prārtthikkaiyil Ināyanā
rum prārtthaṉaippaṭiyē ceytaruḷi nāṅkaḷum janmadeśaṅkaḷile pukutu kaiyil Itukku Uṭalāka tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟamāka Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa poṉpaṟṟiyil nallāṭai Ellaikku vaṭakkum teṟkil poṉpaṟṟiyu muṭpaṭa pottakappaṭi nilam 2 10 6 veliyum nallāṟṟūr vaṭakaraiyil pottakappaṭi nilam 9 veliyum Āka vilai koṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi nilam 3 10 5 veli Itil nāṭṭi ṟaiyiliyākac certtatil cintā
maṇinallūrum teṟkil poṉpaṟṟiyil kaṇṭavāḷivākkālukku meṟkkum Uṭppaṭṭa kār maṟu nilam 10 veli māvaṭai puṉpayirum karumpum kamukan toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭa nāṭṭiṟaiyiliyāka kuṭuttamaiyil nammuṭaiya nāṭu pūcai Iṟaiyili niṅkalāka Aṭaippāṉa nilattile I nilam patiṟṟuveliyum māvaṭai puṉpayirum viḻukkāṭu koṇṭu Ūrvaḻi pertoṟum kūṭṭikkaṭamai celavākkak kaṭavomākavum Immutal
koṇṭu 4 10 tirunuṉtāviḷakku Ulakuṭaiyaperumāḷ tirumenikku naṉṟāka Iṭavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum celluvatāka kallilum veṭṭik koḷḷaveṉṟu vyavasthai paṇṇiṉom Ivai paṇiyāl nāṭ(ṭ)ṭukkaṇakku brahmappiriyan Eḻuttu Ivai tomiyaṉ cantirapūṣaṇabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cākkāṉai śrīṉantikeśvarabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tillaināyakaṉ mutiyoṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai dakṣaṇā murttibhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji mahādevabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kālakālaṉ [ caivācārya] ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji Aṉaintāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai perunallūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṇākarappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ṛṣabhadevan
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji rājanārāyaṇabrahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cūriyaṉ tāḻi tiruvampalapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṇṭi nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tevar kāci nakkaṉ centaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku (ippaṭikku) Ivai tomiyaṉ citarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji Ampalakkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṭampuḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cūralūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nakkavūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai pālāciriyaṉ Ādityabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirtthanāyakabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māmākuṭi Aḻakiya perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji tevarkaḷtevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji poṟkoyilnampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vācciyaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ kālakālatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ulakaṉ maṅkalattu tiruttāṉtoṉṟi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai comattiyaṉ pukkatuṟaivalla coḻabrahmādhirājan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku (ippaṭikku) Ivai comattiyaṉ pāṇi tillainaāyakaṉ kālakāla tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāci Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tomiyaṉ tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śauripaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai māmākuṭi coḻappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyār vaikuntapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai veṇṇaikkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai pacupatipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nallamparuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cempampākkiḻaiyāṉ Eḻuttu naṉtikiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pūtan tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai comattaṉ ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irāyūr varatarācabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuḷattuḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cakkarapāṇipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai veṭciyūruṭai yāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tomiyaṉ varatarācaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
malaṭṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai mekamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poykilattu naraciṅkaṉār Eḻuttu kokkāṭṭu ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nakkattuḻāṉ puḷiyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
